Document:
# Hiring and ID Accesses The following outlines procedure for hiring persons to new positions, or for modifying ID access. Persons who acquire new access or communication channels without the approval of the respective Department Head may be charged with Petty Theft. This escalates to Grand Theft if the stolen access includes Command or Security access.
## Hiring Citizens may request to be hired to a department, or transfer into a new department if they wish to acquire the accesses and responsibilty of the requested position. Hired citizens lose all their original access and must turn in any previous job equipment before recieving their new equipment.
Requests to a position must be approved by the respective Department Head; ideally, a stamped paper document Once approved, hires must recieve their new accesses and comms channels from the Head of Personnel, if they are present.
Personnel being hired to Security positions must obtain a Mind Shield as soon as possible.
## ID Card Accesses Citizens may request for additional access to be given to their ID to fill in additional roles.
Requests for additional access must be approved by the Department Head the new access falls under; ideally a stamped paper document. Once approved the requester must recieve their new access from the Head of Personnel, if they are present.
